source_pr.title: topsql: add sql sum execution duration information
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: crazycs520 <crazycs520@gmail.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

close #31144

Add SQL sum execution duration information for TopSQL.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test


Side effects

- [x] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [x] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory


### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```
